goal: Wire real per-setting live preview controls into the settings detail pane for the 135 default-previewable scalar rows, with Previewing Live status and Save/Revert/Cancel routed through the runtime preview executor.
saveActionImplemented: implemented; persists once through the app's existing safe scalar apply flow (backup/write/reread), enabled only when that flow's review gates are open, otherwise disabled with reason
appCloseRevertMechanism: controller registry drained on detail-pane re-render (session-drop) and on window close-request; only active sessions with applied values revert
throttleMechanism: controller offer_value/drain_pending over the executor's trailing-edge throttle; GTK schedules a single trailing drain timer per control

controlMapping.Number: Slider when source-backed bounds exist, SpinRow otherwise

structuredFamilyPreviewUiStatus.hl.monitor: blocked high-risk; classification shown on the Config page readiness card, no controls
structuredFamilyPreviewUiStatus.hl.animation: not proven yet; shown honestly, no controls
structuredFamilyPreviewUiStatus.hl.curve: not proven yet; shown honestly, no controls
structuredFamilyPreviewUiStatus.hl.gesture: blocked by record semantics; no controls

liveUiSmoke.result: run once: the UI controller drove a throttled multi-offer drag on general.gaps_in against the live compositor, verified the change, cancelled, and verified restoration to the original value

gtkEvidence: a supported row's detail pane shows 'Live Preview: Supported' with 'Save previewed value', 'Revert preview', and 'Cancel preview' controls (duplicate_conflict_DuplicateConflictDetail run, AT-SPI text)

a high-risk row's detail pane shows 'Dead-man preview required' and 'Live preview capability: BlockedHighRisk (risk HighRiskDisplay)' with no enabled preview control (high_risk_display_risk_DisplayRenderRiskDetail run)
aggregate safety flags realConfigEdited, runtimeMutated, hyprlandReloaded, mutatingHyprctlUsed, and applyClicked are all false
live compositor gaps_in verified unchanged after the matrix run
nextRecommendedWork: The supervised dead-man UI is implemented (2 candidates armed, the rest honestly gated). Next: per-row live-proof runs for the 63 needs-live-proof input/cursor rows; separately, decide the structured-family active-config pilot.
